history.content:
<thought>
The goal G is located two rows above and two columns to the right of my current position. The cell directly in front of me is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. I will turn right to face east, which will allow me to move onto a safe floor cell to my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is currently at the bottom center, facing north. The cell directly ahead (north) is floor (`.`), which is safe. The goal `G` is located two rows north and two columns west. Immediate movement forward will bring me to a floor cell from which I can later turn west to reach the goal while avoiding lava cells. Turning in place would not progress toward the goal, so moving forward is the best option.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is located at row6 col2. From my current position (row7 col4), the path to G is two steps west: row7 col3 is safe floor, and row7 col2 is safe floor. The cell directly north is safe floor, but further north is blocked by wall, and the cell west of that is lava, so the safest path is to go west directly. I am currently facing north, so I need to turn left to face west.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (7,4) facing north. The cell directly north (6,4) is floor, safe to move into. The goal is located at (5,5). A clear path exists: move north twice to (5,4), then turn east and move to (5,5). No immediate danger ahead. Moving forward now progresses toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north at position (6,3) in the local view. The goal G is located at (5,4), which is one cell north and one cell east. The cell directly north (5,3) is a floor tile, safe to move into. After moving forward, I can turn east and move into the goal cell. There is lava to my left and right, but the forward path is clear.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is immediately to my right (east). The cell directly north is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn right to face east, then I can move forward into the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me (north) at the cell with 'G'. Moving forward will reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
